ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price entry */,
  "company_code" INTEGER /* Reference to the company whose stock price is being tracked */,
  "exchange_code" TEXT /* Code of the stock exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "price_per_share" REAL /* Price per share in the local currency */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the price was recorded */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time when the price was recorded */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the price is recorded */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of shares traded at this price */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_company_code FOREIGN KEY ("company_code") REFERENCES companies ("company_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_exchange_code FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_code") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_code" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry in which the company operates */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* CEO of the company */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Headquarters location of the company */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector in which the company operates */,
  "description" TEXT /* Short description of the company */,
  "founded" TEXT /* Date when the company was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_code" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each stock exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stock exchange */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the exchange */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the stock exchange */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for inquiries about the exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical price entry */,
  "company_code" INTEGER /* Reference to the company whose historical stock price is being tracked */,
  "exchange_code" TEXT /* Code of the stock exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "price_per_share" REAL /* Historical price per share in the local currency */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the historical price was recorded */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time when the historical price was recorded */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the price is recorded */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of shares traded at this price */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_history_exchange_code FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_code") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_history_company_code FOREIGN KEY ("company_code") REFERENCES companies ("company_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "company_code" INTEGER /* Reference to the company for which analytics data is being recorded */,
  "exchange_code" TEXT /* Code of the stock exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "trend" TEXT /* Current market trend for the stock */,
  "prediction" TEXT /* Predicted market movement for the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the analytics data was recorded */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  "recommendation" TEXT /* Investment recommendation based on the analytics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_analytics_company_code FOREIGN KEY ("company_code") REFERENCES companies ("company_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_analytics_exchange_code FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_code") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "company_code" INTEGER /* Reference to the company related to the alert */,
  "exchange_code" TEXT /* Code of the stock exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price change, market event) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was triggered */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time when the alert was triggered */,
  "sent_to_users" TEXT /* List of users to whom the alert was sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_exchange_code FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_code") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_company_code FOREIGN KEY ("company_code") REFERENCES companies ("company_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., investor, analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user whose preferences are being recorded */,
  "alert_preferences" TEXT /* User's preferences for alerts */,
  "dashboard_layout" TEXT /* User's preferred dashboard layout */,
  "visualization_types" TEXT /* Types of data visualizations preferred by the user */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language preferred by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discussion_forum" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forum post */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the post */,
  "company_code" INTEGER /* Reference to the company discussed in the post */,
  "exchange_code" TEXT /* Code of the stock exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "post_content" TEXT /* Content of the forum post */,
  "post_date" TEXT /* Date when the post was made */,
  "post_time" TEXT /* Time when the post was made */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments on the post */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discussion_forum_exchange_code FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_code") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discussion_forum_company_code FOREIGN KEY ("company_code") REFERENCES companies ("company_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discussion_forum_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expert_blogs" (
  "blog_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each blog post */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial expert who wrote the blog */,
  "company_code" INTEGER /* Reference to the company discussed in the blog */,
  "exchange_code" TEXT /* Code of the stock exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "blog_title" TEXT /* Title of the blog post */,
  "blog_content" TEXT /* Content of the blog post */,
  "publish_date" TEXT /* Date when the blog was published */,
  "publish_time" TEXT /* Time when the blog was published */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags for the blog post */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("blog_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expert_blogs_company_code FOREIGN KEY ("company_code") REFERENCES companies ("company_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expert_blogs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expert_blogs_exchange_code FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_code") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_updates" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news update */,
  "company_code" INTEGER /* Reference to the company related to the news */,
  "exchange_code" TEXT /* Code of the stock exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "news_title" TEXT /* Title of the news update */,
  "news_content" TEXT /* Content of the news update */,
  "publish_date" TEXT /* Date when the news was published */,
  "publish_time" TEXT /* Time when the news was published */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_updates_exchange_code FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_code") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_updates_company_code FOREIGN KEY ("company_code") REFERENCES companies ("company_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who accessed the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the user accessed the platform */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the user accessed the platform */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action performed by the user (e.g., login, view stock, download data) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data visualization */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the visualization */,
  "company_code" INTEGER /* Reference to the company related to the visualization */,
  "exchange_code" TEXT /* Code of the stock exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of data visualization created */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the visualization was created */,
  "creation_time" TEXT /* Time when the visualization was created */,
  "visualization_data" TEXT /* Actual data used in the visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_company_code FOREIGN KEY ("company_code") REFERENCES companies ("company_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_exchange_code FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_code") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlists" (
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the watchlist */,
  "company_code" INTEGER /* Reference to the company in the watchlist */,
  "exchange_code" TEXT /* Code of the stock exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "watchlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the watchlist */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the watchlist was created */,
  "creation_time" TEXT /* Time when the watchlist was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_company_code FOREIGN KEY ("company_code") REFERENCES companies ("company_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who owns the portfolio */,
  "company_code" INTEGER /* Reference to the company in the portfolio */,
  "exchange_code" TEXT /* Code of the stock exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "shares_owned" INTEGER /* Number of shares owned */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date when the shares were purchased */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Price at which the shares were purchased */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_company_code FOREIGN KEY ("company_code") REFERENCES companies ("company_code")
)
